case_title: ERIN LINDSEY COSTANTINI et al VS. EDWARD LITKE DBA 2090 BROADWAY ASSOCIATES et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY CO-PLAINTIFF ONLY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO LITKE PROPERTIES, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-24-2010 AT 10:00AM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE DBA 2090 BROADWAY ASSOCIATES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSTANTINI, ERIN LINDSEY JENSEN, DUGGAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE DBA 2090 BROADWAY ASSOCIATES $2,383.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,633.00, PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5, INCLUDING GIVING NOTICE OF TENANT'S RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY INSPECTION, OR PROVIDING DOCUMENTATION FOR REPAIRS; AND DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO PAY INTEREST ON PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT RESULT IN THE FORFEITURE OF DEFENDANT'S RIGHT TO REPAIR AND DEDUCT. DEFENDANT LITKE PROPERTIES, INC DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $200.00) SERVED JAN-14-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE DBA 2090 BROADWAY ASSOCIATES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JAN-14-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LITKE PROPERTIES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,025.00 FILED BY COSTANTINI, ERIN LINDSEY JENSEN, DUGGAN AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE DBA 2090 BROADWAY ASSOCIATES LITKE PROPERTIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
